title: Bulk Email To Customers Not Available
excerpt: I have Gmail integrated with Monday and am able to email customers in my Contacts board individually, however for some reason I am unable to send bulk emails to customers - i.e. the icon is absent from the menu (see scre…

posts.author: SarahATE (Sarah Cox)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have Gmail integrated with Monday and am able to email customers in my Contacts board individually, however for some reason I am unable to send bulk emails to customers - i.e. the icon is absent from the menu (see screenshot).

Screen Shot 2023-05-22 at 8.48.26 am799×67 8.21 KB

Is anyone able to tell me what the issue may be here, so I don’t have to email each contact individually.

Thanks!

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature is only available on Pro and Enterprise plans that include the CRM product.

Support

Email campaigns and mass emailing

4 min read Feature   Who can use this feature: monday sales CRM only Available on Pro and Enterprise plans   Get ready to supercharge your client communication with our latest feature...

I believe it may be a gradual rollout as well, so if you do have one of those plans and the CRM product, you might want to contact monday.com to ask them to prioritize rollout to your account.

posts.author: Karina (Karina Stewart)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having the same issue, from what I’m reading Monday does not have the functionality to send bulk e-mails, is this correct?

posts.author: marcojohnson (Marc Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a Pro account with CRM - using bulk email out of the CRM side … but can’t do bulk email from the Work Management side (they are connected).
